headline: Charles River Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: CRAI heads into Q1 results with a strong surprise history, solid revenue growth expectations and chances of a potential earnings beat.

headline: Corpay’s New AI Spend-Automation Suite Could Be A Game Changer For Corpay (CPAY)
summary: In late April 2026, Corpay, Inc. rolled out new AI-powered capabilities across its Corpay Complete platform, including an AI Virtual Assistant, automated receipt matching, real-time reporting, and workflow automation spanning commercial cards, expense management, and AP automation. This push to embed practical AI into everyday financial workflows, supported by enhanced APIs for easier integration, highlights Corpay’s efforts to deepen its role in business spend management ecosystems. Next,...

headline: Global Payments (GPN) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: Global Payments (GPN) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +4.83% and +1.25%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
